name: Health-Kick Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the juice of 10 oranges, juice of 6 lemons, sliced bananas (either 6 medium or 4 large), half a cup crushed pineapple, one and a half cups light rum, one cup honey, one cup banana-flavored liqueur, two-thirds cup grenadine syrup, and six drops Angostura bitters in a large bowl. Stir well.
2. Pour the punch mixture into an electric blender in three parts, blending until smooth each time.
3. Transfer the blended punch into a large serving container and stir well.
4. Float lemon slices on top of the punch.
5. Serve over crushed ice. Yield: about 3 quarts.
